headline: TotalEnergies (ENXTPA:TTE) Secures €440 Million For Germany Batteries And Suriname Drilling
summary: TotalEnergies secured €440m in debt financing for a large battery energy storage portfolio in Germany. The company awarded Halliburton a long term drilling contract for its GranMorgu offshore Suriname project. These projects add to TotalEnergies’ mix of European clean energy infrastructure and global upstream activity. For investors tracking ENXTPA:TTE, these moves highlight how TotalEnergies is building out both its renewables and upstream portfolios at the same time. The stock trades at...
